hero.badge: Ithenjwa ngabathengisi abangu-{shopCount}+ kulo lonke uMzantsi Afrika
hero.title: Thengisa Kwi-Intanethi e
hero.subtitle: Guqula ishishini lakho le-WhatsApp lempahla libe yikhathalogi yobungcali. Layisha ifoto — i-AI ibhale uluhlu. Yabelana ngekhonkco lakho ufumane ii-odela nobungakanani, imibala nemilinganiselo.
hero.aiOffer: Ii-listing ezi-5 ze-AI ZASIMAHLA nyanga nganye — akufuneki ikhadi letyala

trustedBy.title: Ithenjwa ngabathengisi kulo lonke uMzantsi Afrika

howItWorks.title: Yenza Ivenkile Yakho Kwi-Intanethi Ngamanyathelo Amathathu
howItWorks.subtitle: Akukho ukuprograma, akukho abayili, akukho iiplatifomu ezibizayo. Iimveliso zakho kunye nenombolo ye-WhatsApp kuphela.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Layisha ifoto yemveliso kwaye i-AI ivelise isihloko, inkcazo, udidi kunye neethegi ze-SEO ngemizuzwana eyi-10. Ii-listing ezi-5 ze-AI zasimahla nyanga nganye.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Fumana i-URL yakho eyodwa. Yifake kumaqela e-WhatsApp, isimo, i-Instagram bio, i-TikTok — naphi apho abathengi bakho bakhoyo.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Abathengi babhrawuza, bakhethe iinketho nemilinganiselo, baze bakuthumele i-odela ecwangcisiweyo ecocekileyo ku-WhatsApp. Nokulandelela kwe-odela okwakhiweyo.

features.title: Yonke Into Oyidingayo Ukuthengisa Kwi-Intanethi eMzantsi Afrika
features.subtitle: Yakhelwe ngokukhethekileyo indlela abathengisi baseMzantsi Afrika abasebenza ngayo ngokwenyani.

whatsapp.title: Ii-odela Ngqo ku-WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Abathengi bakhetha ubungakanani, imibala, nemilinganiselo — baze bakuthumele i-odela enye ecocekileyo ku-WhatsApp. Akukho ukudideka.

mobile.title: Isebenza Kuyo Nayiphi Ifowuni
mobile.description: Akukho i-app ekufuneka uyilayishe. Abathengi bakho bacofa ikhonkco baze babhrawuze. Nkqu nakwidatha emobileni ecotha — isalayisha ngokukhawuleza.

variants.title: Ubungakanani, Imibala Neenketho
variants.description: Abathengi bakhetha kanye into abayifunayo — akusekho imiyalezo ethi "bubungakanani buni?". Wena ubeka iinketho, bona bakhetha.

tracking.title: Landelela Yonke I-odela
tracking.description: Yonke i-odela ifumana inombolo yokulandelela. Hlaziya isimo njengoko uhamba: Ilindile → Iqinisekisiwe → Ithunyelwe → Ifikile.

analytics.title: Bona Obuka Iimveliso Zakho
analytics.description: Yazi ukuba zeziphi iimveliso ezifumana ukubukwa okuninzi, okucofa, nokuvelisa ii-odela ze-WhatsApp ngokwenyani.

photos.title: Iifoto Ezilayisha Ngokukhawuleza
photos.description: Layisha iifoto zeemveliso zakho — sizenza zilayishe ngokukhawuleza kuyo nayiphi ifowuni, nkqu naku-3G.

import.title: Layisha Zonke Iimveliso Ngexesha Elinye
import.description: Uneshipredishithi eneemveliso eziyi-100+? Zilayishe zonke ngemizuzwana. Siza kwenza yonke into.

marketplace.title: Fumana Abathengi Abatsha
marketplace.description: Iimveliso zakho zivela emarikeni ye-TradeFeed — amawaka abathengi baseSA abhrawuza yonke imihla. Ukuvezwa kwasimahla.

notifications.title: Ungaphoswa Kukuthengisa
notifications.description: Fumana isaziso ngokukhawuleza xa ufumana i-odela, xa isitoko siphantsi, okanye xa umthengi eshiya uhlalutyo.

reviews.title: Izimvo Zabathengi Nokulinganisa
reviews.description: Vumela abathengi abonwabileyo bakufakazele. Izimvo zakha ukuthembeka kwaye zincede abathengi abatsha.

verified.title: Ibheji Yomthengisi Oqinisekisiweyo
verified.description: Bonisa abathengi ukuba ulishishini lokwenyani ngebheji eqinisekisiweyo. Ukuthembeka = ukuthengisa okungaphezulu.

revenue.title: Yazi Amanani Akho
revenue.description: Bona imali engenayo yosuku ngalunye, iimveliso ezithengisa kakhulu, kunye nezikhokelo zokukhula. Yazi kanye okusebenzayo.

pricing.title: Qala Simahla. Khulisa Ivenkile Yakho Xa Ukulungele.
pricing.subtitle: Akukho iintlawulo ezifihliweyo, akukho mmangaliso. Phakamisa kuphela xa ishishini lakho likhula.

proPlan.name: Pro
proPlan.subtitle: Amashishini akhulayo
features: Inkxaso ye-WhatsApp — sithumele umyalezo ngokuthe ngqo

faq.title: Imibuzo Ebuzwa Rhoqo
faq.subtitle: Yonke into ekufuneka uyazi phambi kokuqala.

cta.title: Ukulungele
cta.subtitle: Layisha ifoto, i-AI ivelise uluhlu, yabelana ku-WhatsApp. Ii-listing zakho zokuqala ezi-5 ze-AI zasimahla — qala ukuthengisa ngemizuzu engaphantsi kwemithathu.
cta.footer: Ii-listing ezi-5 ze-AI zasimahla · Akukho ikhadi letyala · Seta ngemizuzu engaphantsi kwemithathu · Rhoxisa nangaliphi ixesha

marketplace.title: Imarike
marketplace.subtitle: Fumana iimveliso kubathengisi abaphezulu baseMzantsi Afrika
marketplace.noResultsHint: Zama ukukhangela okwahlukileyo okanye ulungise izihluzi zakho.

errors.unexpectedError: Kwenzeke impazamo engalindelekanga. Iqela lethu lazisiwe.
errors.offlineDesc: Jonga unxibelelwano lwakho lwe-intanethi kwaye uzame kwakhona. Inqwelo yakho nokuthandayo kugcinwe.
